phases.name: Declare the standard
phases.output: Publicly state that important blockchain work requires mission, evidence, validation, receipt, and settlement-readiness boundaries.

phases.name: Require proof packages for new milestones
phases.output: DAO grants, treasury payments, audits, partnerships, and AI-agent tasks must define acceptance criteria before execution.

phases.name: Publish public-safe dockets
phases.output: Each material claim links to a redacted Evidence Docket, replay path, validator report, risk ledger, and human signoff.

phases.name: Bind receipts to governance and settlement readiness
phases.output: No payout, upgrade, milestone closure, or public credibility claim without an accepted Mission Receipt.

phases.name: Use proof as institutional memory
phases.output: Accepted work enters the Chronicle and influences future missions only with proof provenance.

primaryKpi: percentage of material claims linked to accepted proof packages
secondaryKpis: number of claims demoted due to missing proof
